dealSummary: Shenzhen-based AI robotics startup X Square Robot raised four funding rounds, including a Series C that valued the company at over $2.8 billion.
Enterprise AI software developer 8090 raised a $135 million Series A led by Salesforce Ventures.
AI infrastructure company Reed Semiconductor secured a $100 million round.
Straiker, an agentic cybersecurity company, received a $64 million Series A led by investors including Marathon Management Partners, Citi Ventures, Illuminate Financial and Workday Ventures.
leadInvestors: Marathon Management Partners, Citi Ventures, Illuminate Financial, Workday Ventures

dealSummary: Rocket, an India-based AI app-coding startup, is in talks to raise between $40 million and $50 million in a round led by 360 One Asset, The Economic Times reported.
leadInvestors: 360 One Asset, The Economic Times reported

dealSummary: Omen AI, which develops sensors for data center equipment, raised a $31 million Series A led by Nava Ventures.
Nebex, which specializes in capital markets infrastructure for the commercial space sector, secured a $30 million seed round led by GV.
Berlin-based AI search analytics startup Peec AI is in talks to raise funding at a $200 million valuation, Sifted reported.
Gaussion, a London-based developer of energy intelligence technology for battery packs, raised $28 million in a round led by BGF and AlbionVC.
